name: Samsung Cloud Platform
description: Samsung SDS-operated enterprise cloud (SCP) with VPC, AI, blockchain and SAP-certified infrastructure.

seo.title: Samsung Cloud Platform — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Samsung Cloud Platform: Samsung SDS-operated enterprise cloud (SCP) with VPC, AI, blockchain and SAP-certified infrastructure.

when_to_use: Enterprise cloud with SAP-certified infrastructure and AI services
Blockchain-as-a-service on Samsung SDS's enterprise platform
Korean enterprise cloud with dedicated Samsung SDS support
VPC, compute, and GPU for Samsung ecosystem developers
Compliant enterprise cloud for Korean conglomerate workloads

review.verdict: Enterprise cloud primarily for Samsung ecosystem customers, not a developer-first platform.
review.best_for: Korean enterprises inside Samsung supply chain needing SAP-certified private cloud
review.not_for: Individual developers, startups, or teams outside the Samsung orbit
